text.title: contract-first-development Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for contract-first-development as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent modifies server code first, then back-fills the OpenAPI spec to match the implementation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Code-first produces inconsistent APIs across endpoints; the spec becomes documentation, not a contract. Invert the flow: spec changes only until spec is committed.

failure-mode.description: Hand-editing generated server stubs "just this once" instead of modifying the spec and regenerating.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hand-edited generated code is overwritten on the next regen; the change is silently lost, causing a regression.

failure-mode.description: Copy-pasting schema definitions across paths instead of using $ref to components/schemas.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Duplicated schemas diverge; changing one definition does not update the others, creating inconsistent validation.
